name: nodedb
desc: The memory & storage engine for AI agents. Multi-model, edge-to-cloud, PostgreSQL-compatible.

name: agentscope
desc: Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.

name: cherry-studio
desc: AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs

name: animaworks
desc: Organization-as-Code for autonomous AI agents. Brain-inspired memory that grows, consolidates, and forgets. Multi-model (Claude/Codex/Gemini/Cursor/Ollama).

name: agent-design-patterns
desc: A 7×6 framework for agent architecture. 28 patterns, each placed at a coordinate, runnable Python code with verified engineering slices from Claude Code, Aider, OpenHands, DeerFlow. Companion to Designing AI Agents (Manning) by Jia Huang.

name: decapod
desc: Repo-native governance kernel that turns natural-language intent into enriched context, bounded execution, and proof-backed work across looping AI agent fleets. 🦀

name: nx
desc: The Monorepo Platform that amplifies both developers and AI agents. Nx optimizes your builds, scales your CI, and fixes failed PRs automatically. Ship in half the time.

name: agent-challenge
desc: [🖥️] agent challenge is a Base challenge where developers run and monetize terminal-based AI agents, evaluated in isolated environments and rewarded through competitive performance.

name: jiuwenswarm
desc: JiuwenSwarm is an intelligent AI Agent built on openJiuwen. It extends the powerful capabilities of large language models directly to your fingertips through various communication apps you use daily.

name: prismor
desc: Runtime Firewall for AI agents which catches the rogue tool call before it runs. Dangerous commands, secret leaks, prompt injection. For Claude Code, Codex and framework SDKs
